title: Pillai Nila Irandum Vellai Nila Lyrics Neengal Kettavai
stanzas: <div>Pillai Nila Irandum Vellai Nila Lyrics Neengal Kettavai

Pillai nilaa
irandum vellai nilaa.
lala laa
Pillai nilaa
irandum vellai nilaa.

Ennaalum nammai vittu
pogaathu vasantham.
Tholodu roja rendu
urangum.

kai irandil allikondu
kadhodu annai
manam paadum
kangal moodum.

Aalaana singam rendum
kaiveesi nadanthaal
kaaladiyil boomi ellaam
adangum.

singaara thangam  rendum
thaer pola valarnthaa
aagaayam vandhu ingae
vanangum.

kandhalile muththusaram
kaapaathi katti vachchen
naane paasam thaane

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song?

The song Pillai Nila Irandum Vellai Nila evokes feelings of nostalgia and romance, celebrating the beauty of love and nature.

What is the context of this song in the movie?

In Neengal Kettavai, the song reflects the emotional journey of the characters, enhancing the romantic narrative of the film.

Who is the singer and music director of the song?

The song is sung by S. Janaki and composed by the legendary Ilaiyaraaja.

When was this song released?

Pillai Nila Irandum Vellai Nila was released in 1984.
enrichedMetadata.summary: The song Pillai Nila Irandum Vellai Nila from the movie Neengal Kettavai is a beautiful melody that encapsulates the essence of love and nostalgia. It features S. Janaki's soulful voice, which brings forth a soothing and romantic vibe. The lyrics poetically describe the beauty of nature and emotions intertwined with love. This classic song evokes a sense of tranquility and warmth, making it a cherished piece in Tamil music history.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Pillai Nila Irandum Vellai Nila from Neengal Kettavai is a timeless melody that captures the essence of nostalgia and romance. With S. Janaki's enchanting vocals and Ilaiyaraaja's masterful composition, this song transports listeners to a serene world of emotions. Experience the magic of this classic that continues to resonate through generations.
stanzaMeanings: Pillai moon and white moon. lala laa
Like the waves, it plays and brings joy, jumping like a deer in the mind.
Pillai moon and white moon. lala laa Pillai moon and white moon.
Still, spring will not leave us. Two roses will sleep together.
The flowers that bloom will all sing. Something will make the heart think.
The oil will flow from the fragrant flowers tomorrow.
With both hands holding, the mother's heart sings, and the eyes close.
Pillai moon and white moon. lala laa
Like the waves, it plays and brings joy, jumping like a deer in the mind.
When the two lions walk together, the earth will bow down.
The beautiful gold will grow like a chariot, and the sky will come here to bow down.
Only with you, my life is complete.
In love, I have tied the pearl tightly; I am the love itself.
Pillai moon and white moon. lala laa
Like the waves, it plays and brings joy, jumping like a deer in the mind.
